path: WebSocket text_message → Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (Ollama) → Kokoro TTS (CPU) → audio out
notes: Full stack: text received → process_user_message → llm.stream_complete → send_final_response → stream_tts.
Cold first turn ~1.7s (Kokoro/ffmpeg/spacy download on first call); warm turns ~1.1s.
Ollama bench alone (voice_turn): 365ms total. Delta of ~750ms is TTS + server plumbing.
